# awscc_config_remediation_configuration (Resource)

Resource Type definition for AWS::Config::RemediationConfiguration



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_rule_name` (String)
- `target_id` (String)
- `target_type` (String)

### Optional

- `automatic` (Boolean)
- `execution_controls` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--execution_controls))
- `maximum_automatic_attempts` (Number)
- `parameters` (String)
- `resource_type` (String)
- `retry_attempt_seconds` (Number)
- `target_version` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

<a id="nestedatt--execution_controls"></a>
### Nested Schema for `execution_controls`

Optional:

- `ssm_controls` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--execution_controls--ssm_controls))

<a id="nestedatt--execution_controls--ssm_controls"></a>
### Nested Schema for `execution_controls.ssm_controls`

Optional:

- `concurrent_execution_rate_percentage` (Number)
- `error_percentage` (Number)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_config_remediation_configuration.example
  identity = {
    config_rule_name = "config_rule_name"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `config_rule_name` (String)

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_config_remediation_configuration.example
  id = "config_rule_name"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_config_remediation_configuration.example "config_rule_name"
```
